introSection: Unknown is a steel spinning roller coaster from Swiss manufacturer Intamin currently under construction at Moku Sphere in Chongqing, China.

sections.title: History
sections.content: Concept art from when the park was planned to be named Nickelodeon Universe shows the ride was to be named Shredder.

fullText:
Unknown is a steel spinning roller coaster from Swiss manufacturer Intamin currently under construction at Moku Sphere in Chongqing, China.

Concept art from when the park was planned to be named Nickelodeon Universe shows the ride was to be named Shredder.
